input.user_input: The section numbering in the employment agreement is off — Section 7 is duplicated. Renumber everything from Section 7 onward.

actual: Please provide or upload the employment agreement you are referring to. Once you share the document, I can review the numbering and make the necessary corrections to Section 7 and all subsequent sections.
